mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: POWER of P: For higher transitions, raise the Transition Matrix to the nth Power.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: The probability of transitioning from state i to state j in n steps is the (i, j)th entry of the matrix P^n.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: Matrix exponentiation is used to compute these multi-step probabilities.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: The Chapman-Kolmogorov equations provide a way to compute these probabilities by considering intermediate states.
